ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Read-only — your access to this file doesn't include editing.
ast.target: 只读 — 您对此文件的访问权限不包括编辑。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: You don't have permission to view this file. Contact a vault admin if you think this is a mistake.
ast.target: 您没有查看此文件的权限。如果您认为这是个错误，请联系保险库管理员。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 最高（AES-256-GCM + Argon2 密钥派生）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 管理员（完全访问权限 + 用户管理）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 编辑者（读取 + 写入权限）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This code is unique to this device. It is not shared with other vault members, not stored on the server, and not the same as your account password. It's the only way to read this device's encrypted files if the OS keychain is reset, the disk is moved to another machine, or the plugin is reinstalled.
ast.target: 此代码是此设备独有的。它不会与其他保险库成员共享，不会存储在服务器上，也不同于您的账户密码。如果操作系统密钥链被重置、磁盘被移动到另一台机器或插件被重新安装，这是读取此设备加密文件的唯一方式。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: No active bridge leases. Create one here or from the command palette when you want to connect an agent.
ast.target: 没有活跃的桥接租约。当您想要连接代理时，可以在此处或从命令面板创建一个。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Bridge server is idle. It starts when you create a lease.
ast.target: 桥接服务器处于空闲状态。当您创建租约时它会启动。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Your passphrase protects your encryption keys. It is separate from your login password.
ast.target: 您的密码短语保护您的加密密钥。它与您的登录密码是分开的。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: unless your organization administrator performs an emergency key recovery. There is no "forgot passphrase" reset.
ast.target: 除非您的组织管理员执行紧急密钥恢复。没有“忘记密码短语”的重置选项。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Only when a user has lost their encryption passphrase and cannot access their vault. The recovered key allows you to re-encrypt the user's files so they can set a new passphrase. This action is logged and visible in the audit trail.
ast.target: 仅当用户丢失了加密密码短语且无法访问其保险库时。恢复的密钥允许您重新加密用户的文件，以便他们可以设置新的密码短语。此操作会被记录并在审计跟踪中可见。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 VaultGuard 插件...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 VaultGuard 插件...

ast.name: log
ast.source: Obsidian protocol handlers are not available in this Obsidian version; invite links can still be pasted in settings.
ast.target: 此 Obsidian 版本不支持 Obsidian 协议处理器；邀请链接仍可在设置中粘贴。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 通过安全存储路径恢复会话

ast.name: log
ast.target: 通过静态加密路径恢复会话

ast.name: log
ast.source: Vault binding skipped — sync engine deferred until a vault is picked.
ast.target: 跳过保险库绑定 — 同步引擎已延迟，直到选择保险库。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 保险库适配器方法已拦截。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 保险库适配器方法已恢复。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Initial reconciliation declined or aborted — sync engine will not start.
ast.target: 初始协调被拒绝或中止 — 同步引擎将不会启动。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 文件夹生命周期监听器已注册。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Catch-up: could not fetch server inventory, skipping.
ast.target: 追赶：无法获取服务器清单，跳过。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 焦点同步处理器已注册。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Browser network online event received; probing VaultGuard API.
ast.target: 收到浏览器网络在线事件；正在探测 VaultGuard API。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Sync running in limited access mode — downloads only; encrypted uploads are paused until a key lease is available.
ast.target: 同步以受限访问模式运行 — 仅下载；加密上传已暂停，直到获得密钥租约。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Sync: permission rules changed on the server — emitting bus event.
ast.target: 同步：服务器上的权限规则已更改 — 正在发出总线事件。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Sync timer disabled by organization manual-sync policy.
ast.target: 同步计时器因组织手动同步策略而禁用。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Sync timer kept paused (window hidden / offline).
ast.target: 同步计时器保持暂停（窗口隐藏/离线）。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 保险库范围密钥租约：正常

ast.name: log
ast.source: Vault-scoped key lease recovered — full access restored.
ast.target: 保险库范围密钥租约已恢复 — 完全访问权限已恢复。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Key lease renewal deferred until session/network refresh succeeds.
ast.target: 密钥租约续订已推迟，直到会话/网络刷新成功。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Key renewal failed due to network - using remaining lease time.
ast.target: 密钥续订因网络问题失败 - 使用剩余租约时间。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Recovered by issuing a fresh vault-scoped key lease.
ast.target: 通过签发新的保险库范围密钥租约恢复。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Key lease renewal degraded to limited access without logging out.
ast.target: 密钥租约续订降级为受限访问，无需注销。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 连接已恢复，正在刷新离线队列...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 敏感数据已从内存中清除。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Derived vault binding ID is not yet available; refusing to use shared session storage.
ast.target: 派生的保险库绑定 ID 尚不可用；拒绝使用共享会话存储。

ast.name: log
ast.source: No secure session storage available (safeStorage unreachable AND at-rest cipher unavailable) — session will not be persisted to disk.
ast.target: 没有可用的安全会话存储（safeStorage 不可达且静态加密不可用）— 会话将不会持久化到磁盘。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 我已保存我的恢复代码

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shown in write confirmations and logs.
ast.target: 显示在写入确认和日志中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path or glob, for example /project-x/**. Use /** only when the agent really needs the whole vault.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的路径或通配符，例如 /project-x/**。仅当代理确实需要整个保险库时才使用 /**。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time-limited leases live in memory only and expire on the clock. 'Until logout' leases are persistent — they survive Obsidian restarts (encrypted on disk via the at-rest cipher) and end when you log out. Persistent leases require re-auth and cannot use 'Allow writes'.
ast.target: 有时限的租约仅存在于内存中，并会按时钟过期。'直到注销'的租约是持久的——它们会在 Obsidian 重启后保留（通过静态加密在磁盘上加密），并在您注销时结束。持久租约需要重新认证，且不能使用'允许写入'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use confirmation unless you are running a fully trusted local model on a narrow scope.
ast.target: 除非您在有限范围内运行完全受信任的本地模型，否则请使用确认。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugins your vault admin has approved for the team. Each entry prompts you for consent once before being enabled in Obsidian; bytes themselves arrive via the regular sync channel.
ast.target: 您的保险库管理员已为团队批准的插件。每个条目在 Obsidian 中启用前会提示您同意一次；字节本身通过常规同步通道到达。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugins you previously chose 'Don't ask again' for. Unmute one to be re-prompted on the next reconciliation.
ast.target: 您之前选择'不再询问'的插件。取消静音一个，将在下次协调时重新提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Walks the vault and rewrites any plaintext files as ciphertext. Idempotent — files already encrypted are skipped.
ast.target: 遍历保险库并将任何纯文本文件重写为密文。幂等操作——已加密的文件将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log in before viewing, binding, creating, or changing server vaults.
ast.target: 在查看、绑定、创建或更改服务器保险库之前，请先登录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only organization admins and owners can create server vaults.
ast.target: 仅组织管理员和所有者可以创建服务器保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display name for the new server vault.
ast.target: 新服务器保险库的显示名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional note about what belongs in this vault.
ast.target: 关于此保险库中存放内容的可选说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for labelling vaults in admin and plugin views.
ast.target: 用于在管理员和插件视图中标记保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used when a vault admin adds a member without choosing a specific role.
ast.target: 当保险库管理员添加成员但未选择特定角色时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the vault, adds you as its admin, and links this Obsidian folder to it.
ast.target: 创建保险库，将您添加为其管理员，并将此 Obsidian 文件夹链接到它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only vault admins, organization admins, and owners can edit the vault name, description, and default role.
ast.target: 仅保险库管理员、组织管理员和所有者可以编辑保险库名称、描述和默认角色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display name shown in VaultGuard vault lists.
ast.target: 在 VaultGuard 保险库列表中显示的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Short note about what belongs in this vault.
ast.target: 关于此保险库中存放内容的简短说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This vault does not have any explicit members yet.
ast.target: 此保险库目前没有任何显式成员。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Archived vaults are read-only. Reactivate this vault before changing membership.
ast.target: 已归档的保险库是只读的。请在更改成员资格之前重新激活此保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only vault admins, organization admins, and owners can add or remove vault members.
ast.target: 仅保险库管理员、组织管理员和所有者可以添加或移除保险库成员。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All organization users are already members of this vault.
ast.target: 所有组织用户都已是此保险库的成员。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your name shown to teammates in permission headers and access lists. Use your first and last name (e.g. "Jane Smith").
ast.target: 您的姓名在权限头和访问列表中向队友显示。请使用您的名字和姓氏（例如 \"Jane Smith\"）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sign out and clear your session from this device.
ast.target: 注销并从此设备清除您的会话。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste your self-hosted server's public config URL, for example https://your-server.com/.well-known/vaultguard.json.
ast.target: 粘贴您自托管服务器的公共配置 URL，例如 https://your-server.com/.well-known/vaultguard.json。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: VaultGuard REST API or CloudFront base URL. Pasted /settings or /orgs/... URLs are trimmed automatically.
ast.target: VaultGuard REST API 或 CloudFront 基础 URL。粘贴的 /settings 或 /orgs/... URL 会被自动修剪。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses the bundled api.example.com and Cognito configuration.
ast.target: 使用捆绑的 api.example.com 和 Cognito 配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the slug your admin gave you (e.g., "acme-corp"). All connection details will be configured automatically.
ast.target: 输入您的管理员给您的标识符（例如 \"acme-corp\"）。所有连接细节将自动配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste the obsidian://vaultguard-invite link from your invitation email to auto-configure your organization and set your password.
ast.target: 粘贴来自邀请邮件的 obsidian://vaultguard-invite 链接，以自动配置您的组织并设置密码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to check for remote changes (in seconds). Minimum 10 seconds.
ast.target: 检查远程更改的频率（以秒为单位）。最少 10 秒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle sync conflicts when both local and remote versions have changed.
ast.target: 当本地和远程版本都已更改时，如何处理同步冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete every server-side copy of files that match the excluded paths above. Useful after adding a new exclusion: without this, other members on other devices keep pulling the file down. This affects the shared server vault.
ast.target: 删除与上述排除路径匹配的所有服务器端文件副本。在添加新排除项后很有用：否则，其他设备上的其他成员会继续拉取该文件。这会影响共享的服务器保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Encryption level for locally cached files. Higher levels are more secure but slower.
ast.target: 本地缓存文件的加密级别。级别越高越安全，但速度越慢。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long encryption keys remain valid when offline (in hours). After expiry, files cannot be decrypted until reconnection.
ast.target: 离线时加密密钥保持有效的时长（以小时为单位）。过期后，文件在重新连接之前无法解密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically clear all cached vault data if authentication fails repeatedly. This prevents unauthorized access but may cause data loss for unsynced changes.
ast.target: 如果认证反复失败，自动清除所有缓存的保险库数据。这可以防止未经授权的访问，但可能导致未同步更改的数据丢失。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display permission level icons (lock, pencil, shield) next to files in the file explorer.
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中的文件旁边显示权限级别图标（锁、铅笔、盾牌）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display sync status and connection indicator in the bottom status bar.
ast.target: 在底部状态栏中显示同步状态和连接指示器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed API calls before giving up.
ast.target: 失败的 API 调用在放弃前的最大重试次数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable verbose logging to the developer console. Useful for troubleshooting but may expose sensitive data in logs.
ast.target: 启用开发者控制台的详细日志记录。对故障排除很有用，但可能会在日志中暴露敏感数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin won't poll GitHub for new releases. Default off: the plugin checks once every 24 h and shows a notification when a newer version is available. No telemetry is sent — only an outbound HTTPS request to api.github.com.
ast.target: 启用后，插件不会轮询 GitHub 检查新版本。默认关闭：插件每 24 小时检查一次，并在有更新版本可用时显示通知。不会发送遥测数据——仅向 api.github.com 发出站外 HTTPS 请求。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove all locally cached and encrypted vault data. Files will be re-downloaded on next sync.
ast.target: 移除所有本地缓存和加密的保险库数据。文件将在下次同步时重新下载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Immediately invalidate your session and clear all credentials from this device.
ast.target: 立即使您的会话失效，并从此设备清除所有凭据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: There are active leases, but the local bridge server is not listening. Start it before connecting an agent.
ast.target: 存在活动租约，但本地桥接服务器未在监听。请在连接代理之前启动它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Not available on this device — installing the skill needs Node filesystem access (desktop Obsidian only).
ast.target: 此设备不可用——安装技能需要 Node 文件系统访问权限（仅限桌面版 Obsidian）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a folder or file path (supports autocomplete from vault structure)
ast.target: 选择文件夹或文件路径（支持从保险库结构自动完成）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply this rule to a user or a role
ast.target: 将此规则应用于用户或角色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a user ID, '*' wildcard, or role name that should receive this rule.
ast.target: 输入应接收此规则的用户 ID、'*' 通配符或角色名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: None = explicit deny, Read = view only, Write = view + edit, Admin = full control including permission management
ast.target: 无 = 显式拒绝，读取 = 仅查看，写入 = 查看 + 编辑，管理员 = 完全控制，包括权限管理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An invitation will be sent via AWS Cognito
ast.target: 将通过 AWS Cognito 发送邀请

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initial role assignment (can be changed later)
ast.target: 初始角色分配（稍后可更改）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Send an email with setup instructions and invite link
ast.target: 发送包含设置说明和邀请链接的电子邮件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Changing a role immediately updates the user's effective permissions
ast.target: 更改角色会立即更新用户的有效权限

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The user ID of the revoked user whose files need re-encryption
ast.target: 需要重新加密文件的已撤销用户的用户 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will decrypt and re-encrypt all files the user had access to. May take several minutes for large vaults.
ast.target: 这将解密并重新加密用户有权访问的所有文件。对于大型保险库，可能需要几分钟时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a re-encryption job ID to check its progress
ast.target: 输入重新加密作业 ID 以检查其进度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the user ID to recover their wrapped master key
ast.target: 输入用户 ID 以恢复其包装的主密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How vault data is synchronized with the backend
ast.target: 保险库数据如何与后端同步

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to sync (only applies to periodic mode)
ast.target: 同步频率（仅适用于周期模式）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: VaultGuard always encrypts vault data at rest. This policy is always enabled.
ast.target: VaultGuard 始终对静态保险库数据进行加密。此策略始终启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Require multi-factor authentication for all users
ast.target: 要求所有用户进行多因素认证

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force re-authentication after this many hours
ast.target: 在此小时数后强制重新认证

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lock vault after this many minutes of inactivity (0 = disabled)
ast.target: 在此分钟数不活动后锁定保险库（0 = 禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Domains allowed for user invites. Leave blank to allow any domain.
ast.target: 允许用户邀请的域。留空以允许任何域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to retain audit log entries
ast.target: 保留审计日志条目的时长

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Managed by the Cognito user-pool configuration for this deployment.
ast.target: 由此部署的 Cognito 用户池配置管理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Managed by backend deployment configuration and refreshed through key-lease APIs.
ast.target: 由后端部署配置管理，并通过密钥租约 API 刷新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Managed outside the plugin. Hosted SaaS billing belongs in the web admin panel.
ast.target: 在插件外部管理。托管 SaaS 计费属于 Web 管理面板。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 插件允许列表（保险库范围）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 解密所有文件（恢复为纯文本）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从服务器清除排除路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Type the user's email to confirm

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: Claude Code, Codex, 本地模型

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 团队笔记、规格说明和运维手册

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search by user, path, IP, or action...
ast.target: 按用户、路径、IP 或操作搜索...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter your account password to continue.
ast.target: 请输入您的账户密码以继续。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter a recovery code to continue.

ast.name: setText
ast.source: That code isn't recognised. Check for typos — recovery codes start with VG1- and contain hex characters in groups of four.
ast.target: 该代码无法识别。请检查是否有误——恢复码以 VG1- 开头，包含四组十六进制字符。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved when you set up MFA. This will reset your authenticator — you'll be asked to set up a new one on next sign-in.
ast.target: 请输入您在设置多因素认证时保存的恢复码之一。这将重置您的身份验证器——下次登录时将要求您设置新的身份验证器。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Have your authenticator? Use TOTP code
ast.target: 有身份验证器？使用 TOTP 码

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
ast.target: 请输入来自身份验证器应用的 6 位代码

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Lost your authenticator? Use a recovery code
ast.target: 丢失了身份验证器？使用恢复码

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Recovery code accepted. Sign in again with your password to set up a new authenticator.
ast.target: 恢复码已接受。请使用密码重新登录以设置新的身份验证器。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
ast.target: 请输入来自身份验证器应用的 6 位代码。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Offline key lease expired. Reconnect to continue accessing files.
ast.target: 离线密钥租期已过期。请重新连接以继续访问文件。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步：静态加密已就绪。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: cannot read encrypted files on this device.
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步：无法在此设备上读取加密文件。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步 ↻ 正在加载权限...

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步：复制分享链接

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 选择或切换服务器保险库

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Toggle between auto and manual configuration
ast.target: 在自动和手动配置之间切换

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Clear locally cached connection fields and use the bundled Cloud defaults
ast.target: 清除本地缓存的连接字段并使用捆绑的云默认设置

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [VaultGuard] metadataCache.deletePath unavailable in this Obsidian version — backlinks/tags from restricted files may persist until restart
ast.target: [VaultGuard] 此 Obsidian 版本中 metadataCache.deletePath 不可用——受限文件的反向链接/标签可能会持续到重启

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [VaultGuard] Batch access fetch failed, falling back to per-path:
ast.target: [VaultGuard] 批量访问获取失败，回退到按路径获取：

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 恢复码已复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't copy automatically — select the code above and copy it manually.
ast.target: 无法自动复制——请选择上方的代码并手动复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't copy automatically — the JSON is selected, press Cmd/Ctrl+C.
ast.target: 无法自动复制——JSON 已被选中，请按 Cmd/Ctrl+C。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: at-rest key restored. Reopening any open notes will now load decrypted content.
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步：静态密钥已恢复。重新打开任何打开的笔记现在将加载解密内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: all agent bridge leases revoked.
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步：所有代理桥接租约已撤销。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: no managed skill file to remove.
ast.target: VaultGuard 同步：没有可移除的托管技能文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: that bridge lease was already gone.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：该桥接租约已失效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a principal (user or role).
ast.target: 请选择一个主体（用户或角色）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a valid email address.
ast.target: 请输入有效的电子邮件地址。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Email does not match. Please type the exact email to confirm.
ast.target: 电子邮件不匹配。请输入确切的电子邮件以确认。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a target user ID.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select and copy the wrapped key manually.
ast.target: 请手动选择并复制包装密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a user ID or role name.
ast.target: 请输入用户ID或角色名称。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Share link is missing its token.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：共享链接缺少其令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Log in first, then click the share link again.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：请先登录，然后再次点击共享链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: This Obsidian vault isn't connected to a VaultGuard vault yet.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：此Obsidian保险库尚未连接到VaultGuard保险库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: This share link points to a different VaultGuard vault. Switch to the Obsidian vault bound to that VaultGuard vault and click the link again.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：此共享链接指向一个不同的VaultGuard保险库。请切换到绑定该VaultGuard保险库的Obsidian保险库，然后再次点击链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Agent bridge leases revoked.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：代理桥接租约已撤销。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Agent bridge requires Obsidian desktop. This feature is unavailable on mobile.
ast.target: 代理桥接需要Obsidian桌面版。此功能在移动端不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Agent bridge requires Obsidian desktop. Sign in and pick a vault to mint a lease.
ast.target: 代理桥接需要Obsidian桌面版。请登录并选择一个保险库以生成租约。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: update checker is not initialized.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：更新检查器未初始化。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Log in and bind this vault before sharing.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：请在共享前登录并绑定此保险库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard diag: no stored session — login required
ast.target: VaultGuard诊断：无存储的会话——需要登录

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync invite link is missing the org slug.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync邀请链接缺少组织标识符。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: MFA enabled! Please log in again with your authenticator code.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：已启用多因素认证！请使用您的身份验证器代码重新登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: MFA enabled and logged in successfully.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：已启用多因素认证并成功登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Couldn't save recovery codes to the server. Keep the codes you wrote down — you can regenerate from settings later.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：无法将恢复代码保存到服务器。请保留您记下的代码——您可以稍后从设置中重新生成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Open Settings → Community plugins → VaultGuard Sync.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：打开设置 → 社区插件 → VaultGuard Sync。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
VaultGuard Sync: Obsidian Sync is enabled. VaultGuard Sync handles all sync and backup for this vault \u2014 please disable Obsidian Sync to prevent file conflicts.

Settings \u2192 Core plugins \u2192 Sync \u2192 Disable
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：Obsidian Sync已启用。VaultGuard Sync处理此保险库的所有同步和备份——请禁用Obsidian Sync以防止文件冲突。\n\n设置 → 核心插件 → 同步 → 禁用

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: at-rest encryption is using the localStorage fallback (OS keychain unavailable). Files in Finder are encrypted, but a full Electron-profile theft can recover the key. See docs/AT-REST-ENCRYPTION.md.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：静态加密正在使用localStorage回退（操作系统密钥链不可用）。Finder中的文件是加密的，但完整的Electron配置文件盗窃可以恢复密钥。请参阅docs/AT-REST-ENCRYPTION.md。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: at-rest cipher not initialised — cannot run migration.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：静态密码未初始化——无法运行迁移。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: at-rest cipher not initialised — cannot decrypt.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：静态密码未初始化——无法解密。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Comparing your folder with the server vault…
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：正在将您的文件夹与服务器保险库进行比较…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Binding cancelled — no files were modified.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：绑定已取消——未修改任何文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Limited access — downloading accessible server changes only.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：受限访问——仅下载可访问的服务器更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Already in sync — nothing to do.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Full vault access restored.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：已恢复完整的保险库访问权限。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Encryption key lease expired. Please reconnect to continue accessing files.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：加密密钥租约已过期。请重新连接以继续访问文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Connection lost. Working offline with cached data.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：连接已断开。正在使用缓存数据离线工作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Please configure the API endpoint in settings first.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：请先在设置中配置API端点。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: not connected to a server.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: VaultGuard Sync: Your platform doesn't expose secure credential storage. You'll need to log in each time the plugin loads — we never store auth tokens in plaintext.
ast.target: VaultGuard Sync：您的平台不提供安全的凭据存储。您需要在每次插件加载时登录——我们从不以明文形式存储身份验证令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For agents you wrote yourself or that target VaultGuard's plain HTTP-RPC at /rpc. Paste this JSON wherever your agent expects its connection settings.
ast.target: 适用于您自己编写或针对VaultGuard的/plain HTTP-RPC端点的代理。请将此JSON粘贴到您的代理期望其连接设置的任何位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will rewrite every encrypted file in your vault back to plaintext. Anyone with disk access (or another logged-in user on this Mac) will then be able to read your notes through Finder. Re-enter your account password to confirm you're the one doing this.
ast.target: 这将把您保险库中的每个加密文件重写回明文。任何拥有磁盘访问权限（或此Mac上其他已登录用户）的人随后将能够通过Finder阅读您的笔记。请重新输入您的账户密码以确认是您在执行此操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Anyone holding this code can decrypt every file on this device. Enter your account password to confirm before it's shown.
ast.target: 持有此代码的任何人都可以解密此设备上的所有文件。请在显示前输入您的账户密码以确认。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your organization admin role grants read, write, delete, list, and permission management access in this vault.
ast.target: 您的组织管理员角色在此保险库中授予读取、写入、删除、列表和权限管理访问权限。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your vault admin role grants read, write, delete, list, and permission management access in this vault.
ast.target: 您的保险库管理员角色在此保险库中授予读取、写入、删除、列表和权限管理访问权限。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your editor role grants read, list, and write access by default. Direct rules below can narrow or extend that access for specific paths.
ast.target: 您的编辑者角色默认授予读取、列表和写入访问权限。下面的直接规则可以针对特定路径缩小或扩展该访问权限。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your viewer role grants read and list access by default. Direct rules below can narrow or extend that access for specific paths.
ast.target: 您的查看者角色默认授予读取和列表访问权限。下面的直接规则可以针对特定路径缩小或扩展该访问权限。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List vault files visible to this lease, with their effective permission. Filters out hidden, excluded, and out-of-scope paths.
ast.target: 列出此租约可见的保险库文件及其有效权限。过滤掉隐藏、排除和超出范围的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative glob to narrow within the lease scope (e.g. /project-x/**).
ast.target: 可选的保险库相对 glob 模式，用于在租约范围内缩小范围（例如 /project-x/**）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of files to return.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the visible text files for a literal substring. Returns path, line number, and a short snippet for each match.
ast.target: 在可见的文本文件中搜索字面子字符串。为每个匹配项返回路径、行号和简短片段。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要搜索的字面子字符串（不区分大小写）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative glob to narrow within the lease scope.
ast.target: 可选的保险库相对 glob 模式，用于在租约范围内缩小范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a single text file from the vault as plaintext. Goes through VaultGuard's permission and at-rest decrypt path; refuses non-text files and out-of-scope paths.
ast.target: 从保险库中读取单个文本文件为纯文本。通过 VaultGuard 的权限和静态解密路径；拒绝非文本文件和超出范围的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 保险库相对路径（例如 project-x/Plan.md）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Truncate the response to at most this many UTF-8 bytes.
ast.target: 将响应截断为最多这么多 UTF-8 字节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply a unified diff (with @@ hunks) to an existing text file. The hunks must match the current file exactly. Subject to writeMode (deny / confirm / allow) on the lease.
ast.target: 将统一差异（带有 @@ 块）应用到现有文本文件。块必须与当前文件完全匹配。受租约上的 writeMode（拒绝/确认/允许）约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the file to patch.
ast.target: 要修补的文件的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 带有 @@ 块头的统一差异。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new text file with the given content. Refuses to overwrite an existing file. Subject to writeMode on the lease.
ast.target: 使用给定内容创建新文本文件。拒绝覆盖现有文件。受租约上的 writeMode 约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the new file.
ast.target: 新文件的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File content as a UTF-8 string.
ast.target: 文件内容，为 UTF-8 字符串。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 管理员用户已重新激活

ast.name: message
ast.source: Persistent leases cannot use "Allow writes" — long-lived silent writes change the safety property. Pick "Read-only" or "Ask before each write".
ast.target: 持久租约不能使用“允许写入”——长期静默写入会改变安全属性。请选择“只读”或“每次写入前询问”。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Heads up: this gives the agent access to every non-hidden file in this vault until you log out. The re-auth gate confirms you're sure.
ast.target: 请注意：这将授予代理对此保险库中所有非隐藏文件的访问权限，直到您登出。重新认证门控将确认您是否确定。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Persistent leases need a scope. Try /** for the whole vault or /project-x/** for a folder.
ast.target: 持久租约需要一个范围。尝试使用 /** 表示整个保险库，或使用 /project-x/** 表示一个文件夹。

ast.name: message
ast.target: API 返回非 JSON 响应

ast.name: message
ast.target: API 响应中的 JSON 无效

ast.name: message
ast.source: leaseId in request body does not match bearer token.
ast.target: 请求正文中的 leaseId 与承载令牌不匹配。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 VaultGuard 同步菜单

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 VaultGuard 同步设置

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 VaultGuard 同步文件面板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 加密静态保险库（完整流程）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Decrypt vault at rest (back to plaintext)
ast.target: 解密静态保险库（恢复为明文）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 选择或切换服务器保险库

ast.name: text
ast.target: 绑定到一个 VaultGuard 保险库

ast.name: text
ast.source: This Obsidian folder needs to be linked to a server-side vault. Pick one you already belong to, or create a new one.
ast.target: 此 Obsidian 文件夹需要链接到一个服务器端保险库。选择一个你已加入的，或创建一个新的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Need a new vault? Ask an organization admin to create one and add you as a member.
ast.target: 需要新保险库？请组织管理员创建一个并将你添加为成员。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You don't belong to any vaults yet.
ast.target: 你目前不属于任何保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用恢复代码恢复 VaultGuard

ast.name: text
ast.source: Paste the recovery code you saved when you first set up at-rest encryption. After a successful restore your encrypted files will be readable again on this device.
ast.target: 粘贴你首次设置静态加密时保存的恢复代码。恢复成功后，你加密的文件将在此设备上重新可读。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Mint a short-lived token for an external agent. The agent can only use VaultGuard bridge tools within the scope below; hidden and local-only files remain blocked.
ast.target: 为外部代理铸造一个短期令牌。该代理只能在以下范围内使用 VaultGuard 桥接工具；隐藏和本地文件仍被阻止。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enterprise-grade vault security with permission-aware encrypted cloud sync.
ast.target: 企业级保险库安全，支持权限感知的加密云同步。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 代理桥接连接（仅限桌面端。）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Agent bridge is desktop-only. It exposes VaultGuard Sync's tools to local MCP clients (Claudian, Claude Code, Cursor) via a localhost HTTP server, which Obsidian mobile renderers can't host. Manage agent leases from a desktop install of this same vault.
ast.target: 代理桥接仅限桌面端。它通过本地主机 HTTP 服务器将 VaultGuard 同步的工具暴露给本地 MCP 客户端（Claudian、Claude Code、Cursor），而 Obsidian 移动端渲染器无法托管。请从此保险库的桌面端安装管理代理租约。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Agent bridge leases let an external agent (Claudian, Claude Code, Cursor, custom MCP client) talk to this vault through VaultGuard Sync tools. Each lease has its own bearer token; revoking or rotating one does not disturb the others. Hidden paths (.obsidian, .trash, .git, ...) are always blocked.
ast.target: 代理桥接租约允许外部代理（Claudian、Claude Code、Cursor、自定义 MCP 客户端）通过 VaultGuard 同步工具与此保险库通信。每个租约都有自己的不记名令牌；撤销或轮换一个不会影响其他租约。隐藏路径（.obsidian、.trash、.git 等）始终被阻止。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Sign in to access your secured vault.
ast.target: 登录以访问你的安全保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the slug your admin gave you
ast.target: 输入你的管理员提供的标识符

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
ast.target: 输入来自你身份验证器应用的 6 位代码

ast.name: text
ast.source: Lost your authenticator? Use a recovery code
ast.target: 丢失了身份验证器？使用恢复代码

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you lose this passphrase, your data cannot be recovered
ast.target: 如果你丢失此密码短语，你的数据将无法恢复

ast.name: text
ast.source: This unlocks your end-to-end encryption keys locally.
ast.target: 这将在本地解锁你的端到端加密密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Welcome to VaultGuard! Send a verification code to your email, then choose your password.
ast.target: 欢迎使用 VaultGuard！向你的邮箱发送验证码，然后选择你的密码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your email to receive a password reset code.
ast.target: 输入你的邮箱以接收密码重置代码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the code sent to your email
ast.target: 输入发送到你邮箱的代码

ast.name: text
ast.source: 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols
ast.target: 12 个以上字符，包含大写、小写字母、数字和符号

ast.name: text
ast.source: VaultGuard compared this Obsidian folder with the server vault. Review the plan below before any files are downloaded, uploaded, or modified.
ast.target: VaultGuard 已将此 Obsidian 文件夹与服务器保险库进行了比较。在下载、上传或修改任何文件之前，请检查以下计划。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Share links route a teammate to a specific file in this vault. They only work for vault members — non-members can't resolve them.
ast.target: 分享链接可将队友引导至此保险库中的特定文件。它们仅对保险库成员有效——非成员无法解析这些链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active share links. Right-click any file → "VaultGuard: Copy share link" to create one.
ast.target: 暂无活动分享链接。右键点击任意文件 → \"VaultGuard: 复制分享链接\" 即可创建。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your vault admin has added this plugin to the team allowlist. Plugins run code with full access to your vault, so VaultGuard always asks before enabling one.
ast.target: 您的保险库管理员已将此插件添加到团队允许列表中。插件运行的代码对您的保险库拥有完全访问权限，因此 VaultGuard 在启用插件前总会先征求您的同意。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✅ Bundle hash matches the admin-pinned signature.
ast.target: ✅ 包哈希值与管理员固定的签名匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ The admin did not pin a SHA-256 hash. The plugin's bytes have not been verified against a signed reference. Proceed only if you trust the admin and your sync channel.
ast.target: ⚠️ 管理员未固定 SHA-256 哈希值。插件的字节码未与签名的参考值进行验证。仅当您信任管理员及您的同步通道时才可继续。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ❌ The synced plugin bytes do NOT match the admin's pinned hash. This usually means the bundle was modified after the admin approved it. Installation is disabled — contact your admin.
ast.target: ❌ 同步的插件字节码与管理员固定的哈希值不匹配。这通常意味着插件包在管理员批准后被修改过。安装已被禁用——请联系您的管理员。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⏳ The plugin's main.js has not finished syncing to this device yet. Try again after the next sync completes.
ast.target: ⏳ 插件的 main.js 尚未完成同步到此设备。请在下次同步完成后重试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
ast.target: 使用您的身份验证器应用（Google Authenticator、Authy、1Password 等）扫描下方的二维码，然后输入 6 位验证码进行验证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Can't scan? Enter this secret manually:
ast.target: 无法扫描？请手动输入此密钥：

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use these one-time recovery codes to sign in. Each code can only be used once.
ast.target: 如果您无法访问身份验证器应用，可以使用这些一次性恢复代码登录。每个代码只能使用一次。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Store these codes in a safe place (password manager, printed copy, etc.). You will not be able to see them again.
ast.target: 请将这些代码保存在安全的地方（密码管理器、打印副本等）。您将无法再次查看它们。

ast.name: text
ast.source: I have saved my recovery codes
ast.target: 我已保存我的恢复代码

ast.name: text
ast.source: Expiry dates, conflict checks, and effective-permission previews are not exposed by the current backend yet.
ast.target: 当前后端尚未提供过期日期、冲突检查和有效权限预览功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No users found. Click 'Invite User' to add team members.
ast.target: 未找到用户。点击“邀请用户”以添加团队成员。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No specific permissions assigned. User has default role-based access only.
ast.target: 未分配特定权限。用户仅拥有基于默认角色的访问权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No recent activity recorded for this user.
ast.target: 未记录到此用户的近期活动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All active sessions will be immediately invalidated
ast.target: 所有活动会话将立即失效

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cognito tokens will be revoked (no new API calls possible)
ast.target: Cognito 令牌将被吊销（无法进行新的 API 调用）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Encryption keys will be rotated (user cannot decrypt future content)
ast.target: 加密密钥将被轮换（用户无法解密未来的内容）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Local cache self-destruct signal will be sent (clears cached vault data on next sync attempt)
ast.target: 本地缓存自毁信号将被发送（在下次同步尝试时清除缓存的保险库数据）

ast.name: text
ast.source: User will be locked out within 30 seconds on all devices
ast.target: 用户将在 30 秒内在所有设备上被锁定

ast.name: text
ast.source: All pending offline changes from this user will be rejected
ast.target: 此用户的所有待处理离线更改将被拒绝

ast.name: text
ast.source: This action is irreversible. To restore access, you must re-invite the user.
ast.target: 此操作不可逆。要恢复访问权限，您必须重新邀请该用户。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Audit logs are available only in the admin panel.
ast.target: 审计日志仅在管理面板中可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No audit log entries match your filters.
ast.target: 没有符合您筛选条件的审计日志条目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage encryption key recovery for offboarded users and trigger re-encryption of affected files.
ast.target: 管理已离职用户的加密密钥恢复，并触发受影响文件的重新加密。

ast.name: text
ast.source: After revoking a user, re-encrypt all files they had access to with new keys. This ensures the revoked user's old key material cannot decrypt any retained copies. Re-encryption runs automatically on revocation, but you can trigger it manually here.
ast.target: 撤销用户后，使用新密钥重新加密他们有权访问的所有文件。这确保被撤销用户的旧密钥材料无法解密任何保留的副本。重新加密在撤销时会自动运行，但您也可以在此处手动触发。

ast.name: text
ast.source: For organizations using end-to-end encryption (hybrid ZK mode): recover a user's encrypted master key using the organization recovery key. This is a sensitive operation and is fully audit-logged.
ast.target: 对于使用端到端加密（混合零知识模式）的组织：使用组织恢复密钥恢复用户的加密主密钥。这是一项敏感操作，并会完整记录审计日志。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Handle this wrapped key as sensitive recovery material. This action is audit-logged.
ast.target: 请将此包装密钥视为敏感恢复材料。此操作已记录审计日志。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This backend cannot serve organization settings right now. Showing VaultGuard default settings in read-only mode.
ast.target: 此后端当前无法提供组织设置。正在以只读模式显示 VaultGuard 默认设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These are organization policies served by the VaultGuard backend. Password policy, key-lease duration, billing, and infrastructure remain deployment-managed.
ast.target: 这些是由 VaultGuard 后端提供的组织策略。密码策略、密钥租期、计费和基础设施仍由部署管理。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No permission rules for this file. Access is based on default role permissions.
ast.target: 此文件没有权限规则。访问权限基于默认角色权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No visible access for this file.
ast.target: 此文件无可见访问权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Role rules apply to everyone assigned to that role.
ast.target: 角色规则适用于分配到该角色的所有人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Quick add from your team directory
ast.target: 从您的团队目录快速添加

ast.name: text
ast.source: Team directory unavailable right now. You can still type a user ID.
ast.target: 团队目录当前不可用。您仍然可以输入用户 ID。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No teammates found yet. Invite someone from the Users tab first.
ast.target: 尚未找到队友。请先从“用户”标签页邀请成员。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Log in to VaultGuard to see file permissions and sharing status.
ast.target: 登录 VaultGuard 以查看文件权限和共享状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the shield icon in the ribbon or run "VaultGuard: Login" from the command palette.
ast.target: 使用功能区中的盾牌图标，或从命令面板运行 \"VaultGuard: 登录\"。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your access to this vault has been revoked by an administrator.
ast.target: 管理员已撤销您对此保险库的访问权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All locally cached data has been securely wiped. If you believe this is an error, contact your organization administrator.
ast.target: 所有本地缓存数据已被安全擦除。如果您认为这是错误，请联系您的组织管理员。

ast.name: text
ast.source: To regain access, you must be re-invited to the organization. A new invitation will create fresh encryption keys.
ast.target: 要重新获得访问权限，您必须被重新邀请加入组织。新的邀请将创建全新的加密密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No files match the current filters.
ast.target: 没有文件符合当前筛选条件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You don't have read permission to any files in this vault yet.
ast.target: 您目前尚无此保险库中任何文件的读取权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ask your organization admin to grant you access. Newly granted permissions appear here within a few seconds of the next sync.
ast.target: 请让您的组织管理员授予您访问权限。新授予的权限将在下次同步后的几秒钟内显示在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No files in this vault yet.

ast.name: title
ast.target: 通用代理连接（自定义 HTTP-RPC）

ast.name: title
ast.target: Claudian / Claude Code MCP 服务器

ast.name: title
ast.target: 确认持久代理桥接租约

ast.name: title
ast.source: Confirm: decrypt vault on this device
ast.target: 确认：在此设备上解密保险库

ast.name: title
ast.source: Show only files shared with at least one other user or role
ast.target: 仅显示与至少一个其他用户或角色共享的文件
